analysis.seasonal_notes: Google Trends indicates seasonal patterns in MG Road searches. Rising queries show spikes in vehicle-related searches (MG Cyberster, MG Hector, MG M9 on-road prices), suggesting seasonal automotive launches and purchase cycles. Airbnb and hospitality searches (Hyatt, Taj) may spike during tourism seasons (Oct-Feb). Property searches may peak during financial year-end (Mar-Apr) and post-monsoon (Oct-Nov). Recommend monitoring monthly search volume to identify optimal content publication windows and seasonal campaign opportunities.
